title: Sea the love this Valentine’s Day with Kiyana Sailing in Mossel Bay
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Looking for a Valentine’s experience that’s a little different this year?","html":"ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Looking for a Valentine’s experience that’s a little different this year?"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Kiyana Sailing is inviting couples to step aboard of Mossel Bay’s most loved catamaran for a romantic escape on the water - the perfect way to celebrate love while soaking up breathtaking coastal views."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This special Valentine’s offering promises a relaxed and intimate atmosphere, ideal for couples wanting to enjoy quality time together away from the usual restaurant crowds.","html":"This special Valentine’s offering promises a relaxed and intimate atmosphere, ideal for couples wanting to enjoy quality time together away from the usual restaurant crowds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Guests can expect a luxurious yet peaceful setting, friendly and professional crew members and an unforgettable journey along Mossel Bay’s beautiful shoreline.","html":"Guests can expect a luxurious yet peaceful setting, friendly and professional crew members and an unforgettable journey along Mossel Bay’s beautiful shoreline."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As part of the experience, couples will be welcomed aboard and treated to a complimentary tin of champagne (sunset cruise receive a complimentary champagne & sushi tray per couple) - the perfect way to toast to love while watching the ocean stretch out around you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you’re celebrating a new relationship, a long-time partnership or simply looking for a memorable date idea, this sailing experience offers a unique blend of romance and adventure.","html":"Whether you’re celebrating a new relationship, a long-time partnership or simply looking for a memorable date idea, this sailing experience offers a unique blend of romance and adventure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kiyana Sailing has built a reputation for exceptional service and scenic trips that showcase the natural beauty of the Garden Route.","html":"Kiyana Sailing has built a reputation for exceptional service and scenic trips that showcase the natural beauty of the Garden Route."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With limited spaces available for the Valentine’s period, early booking is strongly recommended to avoid disappointment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Make this Valentine’s Day one to remember - swap the ordinary for a magical moment at sea and create lasting memories with someone special.","html":"Make this Valentine’s Day one to remember - swap the ordinary for a magical moment at sea and create lasting memories with someone special."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bookings can be made directly with Kiyana Sailing on 083 637 0821.","html":"Bookings can be made directly with Kiyana Sailing on 083 637 0821."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
